include_rules: If the title matches the official distance / time format, include=true.
Manual overrides are applied after automatic normalization and can replace the final backend decision per post_id.
review_rules: review_needed=true means the title is missing or invalid and should be reviewed or corrected.
Applied manual overrides clear review_needed and become the backend-authoritative final state.
ui_rule: Frontend must render include/exclude from backend include boolean only and surface review queue from backend review_needed only.
